headlines.title: Trump heads to high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: President Trump has left for Beijing and a high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas is there.

headlines.title: Inside China’s battle for electric vehicle dominance
headlines.description: Tom Llamas takes a Chinese electric vehicle for a test drive to see why brands like BYD are dominating the global market and why a 100% U.S. tariff is part of what’s keeping them out of American driveways.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: Pentagon considering renaming Iran war ‘Sledgehammer’ if ceasefire collapses
headlines.description: The U.S. military is considering officially re-naming the war with Iran to “Operation Sledgehammer” if the current ceasefire collapses

headlines.title: Longtime ICE official David Venturella chosen to head agency
headlines.description: Longtime ICE official David Venturella has been chosen to lead the immigration agency after its former acting director’s departure was announced last month, a Department of Homeland Security spokesperson said.

headlines.title: Van Hollen questions FBI Director Patel about alleged drinking problems
headlines.description: During a Senate hearing, Sen. Chris Van Hollen, D-Md., and FBI Director Kash Patel got into a heated exchange over allegations about the director's drinking.

headlines.title: Inside Russia’s push to recruit students as drone pilots in Ukraine
headlines.description: College students across Russia are being lured to join the country’s drone forces in Ukraine, but rights activists say the offer could be a trap.

headlines.title: Jason Collins, the first openly gay NBA player, dies at 47 from brain cancer
headlines.description: Jason Collins, a longtime NBA center who became the first man to come out as openly gay while playing in any of America’s four leading professional sports leagues, died Tuesday following months of treatment for glioblastoma, his family said.

headlines.title: Inside look at quarantine facility for cruise ship passengers
headlines.description: One of the passengers from the cruise ship hit with a deadly outbreak of Hantavirus posted a video showing what the accommodations are like at the special medical facility in Omaha where passengers are being monitored. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Waymo issues recall over ability to handle flooded streets
headlines.description: Waymo issues recall over ability to handle flooded streets

headlines.title: NBC's Tom Costello rescues teen driver from burning car
headlines.description: NBC's Tom Costello rescues teen driver from burning car

headlines.title: First openly gay NBA player Jason Collins dies at 47
headlines.description: First openly gay NBA player Jason Collins dies at 47
